{{Infobox construct
| name = White Titan
| introduced = lh-03-the-knight
}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[White Titan]] is one of the [[Divine Titans]].}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[White Titan]] is a [[Divine Titan]] used by [[Aelora]] that is smaller and sleeker than [[Raion]]'s.}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[White Titan]] uses a magical weapon made of crystallized dust.}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
